files.content:
pack_id: weatherapi-pack
version: 0.1.0
kind: application
publisher: Greentic
components:
- id: ai.greentic
  version: 0.1.0
  world: root:component/root
  supports:
  - messaging
  profiles:
    default: default
    supported:
    - default
  capabilities:
    wasi:
      random: false
      clocks: false
    host: {}
  wasm: components/adaptive-card/component_adaptive_card.wasm
- id: weatherapi_current
  version: 0.1.0
  world: root:component/root
  supports:
  - messaging
  profiles:
    default: default
    supported:
    - default
  capabilities:
    wasi:
      random: false
      clocks: false
    host:
      secrets:
        required:
        - key: auth.param.get_weather.key
          required: true
          description: Shared WeatherAPI key used for current and forecast weather requests.
          scope:
            env: dev
            tenant: demo
          format: text
        - key: auth.param.get_forecast_weather.key
          required: true
          description: Shared WeatherAPI key used for current and forecast weather requests.
          scope:
            env: dev
            tenant: demo
          format: text
      http:
        client: true
        server: false
  wasm: components/weatherapi_current.component.wasm
dependencies: []
flows:
- id: default
  file: flows/main.ygtc
  tags:
  - default
  entrypoints:
  - default
- id: flow_
  file: flows/flow_.ygtc
  tags:
  - internal
  entrypoints:
  - default
- id: flow_error
  file: flows/flow_error.ygtc
  tags:
  - internal
  entrypoints:
  - default
- id: flow_get_forecast_weather
  file: flows/flow_get_forecast_weather.ygtc
  tags:
  - internal
  entrypoints:
  - default
- id: flow_get_weather
  file: flows/flow_get_weather.ygtc
  tags:
  - internal
  entrypoints:
  - default
assets:
- path: assets/weather_forecast_card.json
- path: assets/weather_forecast_payload.json
- path: assets/weather_current_result_card.json
- path: assets/weather_forecast_result_card.json
- path: assets/weather_error_card.json

id: flow_
type: messaging
start: render_weather_card
nodes:
  render_weather_card:
    emit.response:
      renderedCard:
        "$schema": "http://adaptivecards.io/schemas/adaptive-card.json"
        type: "AdaptiveCard"
        version: "1.5"
        body:
          - type: "TextBlock"
            size: "Large"
            weight: "Bolder"
            text: "Weather Assistant"
            wrap: true
          - type: "TextBlock"
            text: "WeatherAPI is configured via secrets. Enter the request values below."
            wrap: true
            isSubtle: true
          - type: "Input.Text"
            id: "q"
            label: "City / Location"
            placeholder: "Nairobi"
            isRequired: true
            errorMessage: "Location is required"
            value: "Nairobi"
          - type: "Input.Number"
            id: "days"
            label: "Forecast days"
            placeholder: "3"
            min: 1
            max: 10
            value: 3
        actions:
          - type: "Action.OpenUrl"
            title: "Get API Key"
            url: "https://www.weatherapi.com/signup.aspx"
          - type: "Action.Submit"
            title: "Current Weather"
            data:
              operation: "get_weather"
              method: "get_weather"
          - type: "Action.Submit"
            title: "Forecast Weather"
            data:
              operation: "get_forecast_weather"
              method: "get_forecast_weather"
    routing:
      - out: true

id: flow_error
type: messaging
start: render_error_card
nodes:
  render_error_card:
    component.exec:
      component: "ai.greentic"
      operation: card
      input:
        card_source: asset
        card_spec:
          asset_path: assets/weather_error_card.json
        payload:
          request: "{{in.input.metadata}}"
          error:
            title: "Weather request failed"
            operation: "{{in.input.metadata.operation}}"
            message: "{{in.input.metadata.error_message}}"
    routing:
      - out: true

id: flow_get_forecast_weather
type: messaging
start: call_forecast
nodes:
  call_forecast:
    component.exec:
      component: "weatherapi_current"
      operation: get_forecast_weather
      input:
        q: "{{in.input.metadata.q}}"
        days: "{{in.input.metadata.days}}"
        aqi: "no"
        alerts: "no"
    routing:
      - to: render_forecast_card

  render_forecast_card:
    component.exec:
      component: "ai.greentic"
      operation: card
      input:
        card_source: asset
        card_spec:
          asset_path: assets/weather_forecast_result_card.json
        payload:
          request: "{{in.input.metadata}}"
          result: "{{node.call_forecast.result.structured_content}}"
    routing:
      - out: true

id: flow_get_weather
type: messaging
start: call_weather
nodes:
  call_weather:
    component.exec:
      component: "weatherapi_current"
      operation: get_weather
      input:
        q: "{{in.input.metadata.q}}"
        aqi: "no"
    routing:
      - to: render_current_card

  render_current_card:
    component.exec:
      component: "ai.greentic"
      operation: card
      input:
        card_source: asset
        card_spec:
          asset_path: assets/weather_current_result_card.json
        payload:
          request: "{{in.input.metadata}}"
          result: "{{node.call_weather.result.structured_content}}"
    routing:
      - out: true

id: default
type: messaging
start: dispatch
nodes:
  dispatch:
    flow.call:
      flow_id: "flow_{{in.input.metadata.operation}}"
      input: "{{in}}"
    routing:
      - out: true
